summary: PWA & Performance Optimization testing completed successfully. All PWA features verified: manifest.json accessible with correct fields (short_name: VexlyPOS, display: standalone, icons array), Service Worker registers correctly, HTML meta tags present (translate='no', lang='es', google notranslate, apple-touch-icon, apple-mobile-web-app-capable). Login with PIN 10000 works correctly. Page navigation between dashboard, tables, kitchen, settings works with smooth framer-motion transitions. React Query provider active with no console errors. All backend APIs respond correctly (products, categories, tables, system/config, customers).

api_verification.POST /api/auth/login: 200 OK - Returns token and user data

ui_verification.login_flow: PASS - PIN 10000 works, clock-in modal appears, entry registered
ui_verification.dashboard_navigation: PASS - Dashboard loads with sales data, open tables, etc.
ui_verification.tables_navigation: PASS - Table map displays with status colors
ui_verification.kitchen_navigation: PASS - Kitchen view shows active orders
ui_verification.settings_navigation: PASS - Configuration page with user management
ui_verification.react_query: PASS - No QueryClient errors in console

critical_code_review_comments: PWA implementation is complete and correct
Service Worker caches static assets and API responses appropriately
IndexedDB offline storage is properly configured in offlineDB.js
React Query configured with sensible defaults (2min stale, 10min gc)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA features fully verified. Login requires clicking 'Marcar Entrada' then 'OK' on clock-in modal. All navigation works correctly. ConnectionStatus component only shows when offline or has pending sync items (returns null when online with 0 pending).
features_tested: PWA manifest.json accessible at /manifest.json with correct fields
Service Worker accessible at /sw.js and registers correctly
HTML has translate='no', lang='es', meta google notranslate
Login with PIN 10000 works correctly and navigates to dashboard
Page navigation between dashboard, tables, kitchen, settings works with smooth transitions
React Query provider is active (no errors in console about QueryClient)
Backend API endpoints respond: GET /api/products, GET /api/categories, GET /api/tables, GET /api/system/config, GET /api/customers
